extName.message: My Bookmarks Manager - Open Source by Urls.ai

extDescription.message: Open-source, local-first private bookmark manager for Chrome with private pages, tab sessions, and local captures.

commandSavePrivatePage.message: Save current page as a private bookmark

commandSaveWindowSession.message: Save the current window as a session

popupSubtitle.message: All your URLs in one place.

sidepanelSubtitle.message: All your URLs in one place.

settingPrivacyDescription.message: Show the Private tab and keep hidden bookmarks outside Chrome bookmarks.

settingHideDuplicatesDescription.message: Keep only the first result for the same URL in lists.

settingCardDensityDescription.message: Choose between a single-column list or two-column cards in popup views.

settingContextMenuTitle.message: Enable Save Private Page in right-click menu

settingContextMenuDescription.message: Off by default. Adds a page context menu item so you can save the current site into hidden private bookmarks.

settingLocalCaptureContextMenuTitle.message: Enable Local Capture in right-click menu

settingLocalCaptureContextMenuDescriptio.message: On by default. Adds actions for selected text, links, and images.

settingLocalCapturesDescription.message: Capture pages and keep local text, links, and images in this extension.

limitedTimeReminder.message: Limited-time: delete linked private bookmark after alert

channelSystemDescription.message: Chrome and macOS desktop notification center.

channelBannerDescription.message: Show an in-app alert bar in New Tab / popup.

channelToolbarPopupDescription.message: Try to open the extension popup from the toolbar automatically.

channelPopupWindowDescription.message: Open a focused standalone reminder window.

channelNativeNote.message: Native messaging is not in this test group yet. It needs a separately installed local host app, not just a checkbox.

reminderDebugNote.message: Reminders are stored locally and reviewed in this extension.

popupFootnote.message: Local-first. Your data stays in Chrome unless you export it.
